description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a matte black finish, suitable for urban environments. It has a fixed stock and a pistol grip for stability and control, with a detachable box magazine inserted in front of the trigger guard. The upper receiver is equipped with a rail system, supporting a mounted optical sight for improved targeting. The barrel is short, making the weapon more maneuverable in confined spaces, and a muzzle device is attached at the end. Additional tactical accessories, such as a foregrip or flashlight, are mounted on the lower rail, enhancing its utility for close-quarters operations.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, short barrel, rail-mounted sight, and detachable box magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle device and the alignment of the sighting system.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the fixed stock, pistol grip, magazine, and mounted sight, as well as the tactical accessory on the lower rail.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the stock and the top-mounted sight, with the barrel and muzzle device visible at the far end.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, magazine, and tactical accessory, with clear visibility of the short barrel and muzzle device.
